title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Local Authorities Loans Act, 1914. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India except 2[the territories which, immediately before the 1st November, 1956, were comprised in Part B States.]]
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for sub-section (2). 2. Subs. by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 2) Order, 1956, for Part B States.
